overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring the protagonist Aloy walking through a snowy mountain forest trail with tall pines, then transitioning via a fade-to-black to a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape at night. The second half showcases neon-lit traditional Asian architecture, massive holographic projections, and atmospheric fog as Aloy explores the illuminated urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain forest trail with rocky cliffs

events.description: screen fades to black indicating scene transition

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking steadily along the snow-covered mountain path, occasionally looking around at the towering pines and misty peaks

entered.detail: Tall evergreen pine trees lining both sides of the mountain path with dense foliage
Snow-covered mountain trail with patches of exposed rock and dirt
Steep rocky cliff face with snow patches rising alongside the path
Distant mountain peaks shrouded in atmospheric mist and fog
Brown and orange shrubs alongside the path indicating late season

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks through a narrow mountain trail surrounded by tall pine trees and snow-covered ground. The overcast sky creates diffused natural lighting, with misty peaks visible in the distance. The path winds between rocky cliffs and dry bushes, creating an enclosed forest atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city plaza with holographic pagoda

events.description: fade from black reveals futuristic cyberpunk cityscape with neon lighting
slight turn to the right while passing alongside the pagoda structure

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking through the neon-lit city plaza, approaching and passing a large holographic pagoda with energy projections

entered.detail: Multi-tiered traditional Asian pagoda with blue neon edge lighting and dark tiled roofs
Large swirling red and purple holographic energy projection hovering above the pagoda
Distant city buildings illuminated with colorful neon lights and signs
Paved stone walkway with rectangular tiles through the city plaza
Tall palm trees silhouetted against the neon lights and night sky

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide-open cyberpunk city plaza at night. Aloy walks toward and alongside a massive traditional pagoda adorned with blue neon trim and topped with a swirling red holographic projection. The stone path is flanked by palm trees while distant buildings glow with neon lights against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk neon boulevard with temple district

events.description: pagoda passes out of view as large neon temple structures come into focus
turning left to approach the large neon-lit temple complex

agents.ego_description: Aloy continuing through the cyberpunk district, moving past the pagoda toward larger neon-lit temple structures and holographic building projections

entered.detail: Traditional temple building with vibrant multicolored neon trim outlining the roof edges
Large monumental building with tall columns illuminated by golden holographic projections
Ruined stone structure with tall broken pillars and weathered walls

segments.scene_description: Aloy moves deeper into the cyberpunk city, leaving the pagoda behind as she approaches a neon-lit temple complex on the left. The path leads toward a large holographic theater building with golden columns while ancient ruins dot the landscape. The atmosphere remains thick with fog and illuminated by vibrant neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a secluded mountain forest that emphasizes a sense of isolation and natural enclosure. It begins with Aloy navigating a narrow trail, where the camera tracks her movement across snow-covered ground. As she advances, the path winds between rocky cliffs and dry bushes, further tightening the surrounding environment. The scene then opens slightly to reveal tall pine trees framing the route, while the diffused light of an overcast sky casts a soft glow over the landscape. Finally, the camera pushes forward toward the horizon, where misty peaks emerge in the distance through the forest canopy.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched cyberpunk plaza that gradually deepens into a dense urban temple district. It begins with Aloy walking across a wide-open stone path toward a massive traditional pagoda adorned with blue neon trim and a swirling red holographic projection. As she moves past the pagoda and its flanking palm trees, the perspective shifts deeper into the city where the open plaza gives way to a more crowded architectural landscape. The scene then expands to reveal a neon-lit temple complex on the left and a large holographic theater with golden columns ahead. Finally, the camera pushes forward through a thick, illuminated fog, passing ancient ruins that contrast with the vibrant glow of the surrounding futuristic cityscape.
